footer.tagline: Nurturing Africa's next generation of scientist-leaders through research, mentorship, and community.
footer.newsletterThanks: Thanks — check your inbox to confirm your subscription.

hero.headline: {lead} next {accent} start here.
hero.dek: We nurture ambitious high-school and gap-year students through intensive research programs, mentorship, and a pan-African community of practice.

stats.talkAttendeesCaption: At STAIJA Talks and public events

programs.heading: Two paths to accelerated impact.
programs.stepupBlurb: A rigorous, Nigeria-based research incubator for high-school and gap-year students. Access world-class labs, receive a stipend, and publish your first paper.
programs.dynamergeBlurb: A pan-African virtual summer bootcamp connecting ambitious students with global mentors. Four weeks of intense learning, collaboration, and skill-building.

hero.dek: 100% of your donation directly funds student research, stipends, and materials.

tiers.builder: Covers a research stipend for a month
tiers.sponsor: Sponsors a full StepUp cohort placement

receipt.heading: What happens next?
receipt.body: You'll instantly receive a tax-deductible receipt via email. Expect an impact report at the end of the semester, and an option to be listed in our Annual Report.

transparency.heading: Where the money goes.
transparency.body: We believe in radical transparency. Your donation isn't just a drop in the bucket; it's a measurable investment in a scholar's path.
